title: Simple Automata - Rocking ship sculpture from driftwood - part 2
description: So - here it is to finish the little sculpture. In mine i haven't quite finished it - i think the sea is a little dark and the handle could do with a nice bead on it to make it pretty. I might over paint the sea section later with a cerulean blue or mix in some white into blue i used. But i have quite a lot to be getting on with right now i have put it away for a bit - I'll probably revisit it nearer Christmas when i usually think about giving these things away. Anyhow good luck with the make and i hope you enjoy.
